positive: Stylized biomechanical fox spirit seamlessly integrated with constellations and celestial nebulas, a highly detailed, symmetrical central composition. The design features clean, sharp silhouettes, intricate geometric patterning that suggests both mythology and scientific diagrams. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, vibrant cyan, metallic gold accents, and stark white contrast. The style should evoke a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and contemporary vector graphic clarity, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be centralized and ready for tiling or single-placement printing. Full body, facing forward, dynamic but structured pose. Clean lines, solid color blocking, ultra high detail.
